name: Anonymous search on RuTor

falsifiability_protocol.mutation_step: Remove TrackerCapability.SEARCH from the capabilities set.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: RuTor.getFeature<Searchable>() returns null; search UI surfaces 'Search not supported on this tracker'; result-row assertion fails.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_assertion_message_substring: Failed to assertWaitUntil: condition not met within 30000ms
falsifiability_protocol.revert_step: Re-add TrackerCapability.SEARCH to the capabilities set.

operator_run_instructions: Capture screenshot of search results from rutor.info or rutor.is.
Perform falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture failure assertion verbatim, revert.
